item.description:
# iData v0.1.9
This release finalizes the distribution and documentation updates around Homebrew and release workflow stability.
## Highlights
- README header badges refreshed and streamlined - README split into English (`README.md`) and Chinese (`README_zh.md`) with language switch links - VisiData install guidance aligned to `pipx install visidata` + `pipx inject visidata openpyxl` - Homebrew cask sync workflow hardened for release/prerelease handling
## Notes
- Primary install path: - `brew install --cask laleoarrow/tap/idata` - VisiData remains an external dependency and should be installed separately.
